since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.70%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.31% · BTC -2.62% · Gold +0.41% · Nasdaq100 +0.89%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.70%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.70%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +21.88%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.88%, AMBA +6.46%, KLAC +4.97%, LRCX +4.77%, ASML +4.06%. Laggards: DLR -5.46%, TTD -4.81%, EQIX -3.55%, SMR -2.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.45% at $164.92
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
